name: Waimanalo Country Farms
tagline: Seasonal pumpkin patch, corn maze, and farm activities on a real Waimanalo farm — fall is the best time.
parking: Free parking in the farm field lot
hours: Seasonal — typically open Oct–Nov for pumpkin season, check website/social media for dates
bestTime: Weekday mornings during pumpkin season for shortest lines; arrive at opening on weekends
talkStory: Run by a multi-generational Waimanalo farming family, this working operation transforms into a beloved seasonal attraction each fall. The pumpkin festival -- corn maze, hayrides, petting zoo, and u-pick pumpkins -- has been an Oahu Halloween tradition since the early 2000s. The farm grows everything on-site using Waimanalo's rich soil, famous across Hawaii for producing the state's best fruits and vegetables. October weekend lines snake around the block, so weekday mornings are the insider move.
